comment.body:
That’s what I’ve been thinking but I didn’t know what you were seeing on your end. VIX3M and VIX futures barely move while SPX almost made new lows seems like a spot down/vol down regime and especially with positioning as time has gone on today, more calls and puts have been sold than anything else, hardly any buying right now on SPX. 

Correct me if I’m wrong but the IV tails seem to continue to be bid into March OPEX? It makes me think we have lower to go there, no? (looking at 5410 SPX and 18500 NQ)

comment.body: bear market rallies are caused when the puts are closing. Thats the issue here, we aren't seeing these close, but we also aren't seeing new puts being opened (hence the skew not improving). Thats why the JPM collar is so critical because it is the largest support due to the expiration
comment.raw_body: bear market rallies are caused when the puts are closing.
